summary: The original logic for 'q' in TopModule does not match the required combinational function as inferred from the waveform table. By analyzing the truth table, the correct logic is: q = (a & b & ~c & ~d) | (a & ~b & c & ~d) | (a & ~b & ~c & d) | (~a & b & c & ~d) | (~a & b & ~c & d) | (~a & ~b & c & d) | (~a & ~b & ~c & ~d). This covers all cases where q=1 in the provided table. The RTL is updated accordingly.
risks: If the truth table was misinterpreted, the logic may still not match the reference.
Manual translation of the table to logic could introduce errors if not carefully checked.
next_steps: Run simulation to verify that the new logic matches the reference outputs for all test vectors.
If mismatches remain, re-examine the truth table and logic minimization.
